[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 1001111011 7
2 1101100010 5
3 0110010100 4
4 0010101000 3
5 0011111100 6
6 0000000000 a
7 0101100000 3
